open_items: Resumed BlueStacks sweep after reconnect permission/login prompt. Current top-bar power and diamonds were refreshed, but missing building levels were not updated because the city map still would not pan reliably and visible hitboxes only opened already-saved Research Center/Enlistment Office panels.
Profile, troop preview, current city skin, and total skin bonuses have been read from BlueStacks and saved in this file.
AI Planner now uses only confirmed current rows for recommendations; unconfirmed buildings are deliberately excluded from upgrade recommendations instead of assuming a default level.
Furnace FC9 and Cookhouse Lv. 10 have now been directly read and saved; remaining exact building reads should continue through each building's Details panel.
Command Center, Embassy, Barricade, Shelter, troop camps, and remaining resource buildings still need exact detail-panel reads if the dashboard should calculate every building from current to FC10.

Research Center tree was captured for visible/opened nodes. War Academy Helios branch ends, Lancer core nodes, Marksman core nodes, and shared MAX nodes are saved; exact Infantry base attack/defense node names remain pending because BlueStacks ignored map-pan attempts.
Collection Gallery rank/progress and Marching pages 1-2 were opened/read; Flame Tech and full gallery item-by-item stats still need a deeper pass.

Backpack Resources was item-card read for visible gems, Fire Crystal materials, hero XP/stamina, resource chests, and meat/wood/coal/iron stacks; lower hidden rows and some non-Resources tab items may still need another pass.
